19d88a6c66f9ea65.body:
From waste to wonder: Upcycled ingredients transforming the future of food

April 23rd, 1:00PM ET

Your production waste could be your next bestselling ingredient.

Leading CPGs are turning discarded byproducts into premium nutritional compounds—creating products consumers want while reducing environmental impact.

Join industry experts to discover the technologies, strategies, and market successes transforming food waste into competitive advantage.

You'll Learn:
* How upcycled ingredients drive innovation and sustainability
* Practical strategies for converting waste into revenue
* Regulatory navigation and market positioning that works

Speakers: Ariel Altman (Figa Foods), Brad Buchholz (POM), Heather Carter (SupplySide), Tracy Favre (Handsome Brook Farms), Jill Houk (Culinary Culture), Amanda Oenbring (Upcycled Food Association).

Sent by Informa Markets.

19db072e3277c5b8.subject: What if your daily research ran itself?
19db072e3277c5b8.body:
What if your daily research ran itself? 9 Product Hunt trends, profiled and published as a website — from one prompt.

Turn a Prompt into a Product Trend Website

Hi there,

Keeping up with Product Hunt takes more effort than it should — clicking through listings, reading descriptions, sorting by category. By the time you have something shareable, an hour is gone.

Manus does it all from a single prompt — and delivers the results as a live, interactive website.

We asked: "Visit Product Hunt and give me updates on trending products of the day. Present the output as a website."

What Manus Did:
1. Browse & Collect — Navigated to Product Hunt, identified all 9 trending products, scraped names, descriptions, votes, ratings, tags.
2. Analyze & Enrich — Visited each product page to extract key features, target audiences, innovation angles, scenario-based use cases across 6 categories (AI, Productivity, Hiring, Marketing).
3. Build & Deploy — Designed and coded a React website with interactive product cards, category filtering, detail modals, responsive layout — deployed live to a public URL.

The Result: 9 products profiled, 2,096 total upvotes, 6 categories covered.

Top products: HuHu AI Agent (E-Commerce / AI, 435), findable. (Marketing / SEO, 418), AI Phone Screener (Hiring / AI, 318), One Dollar Resume (Hiring / Career, 197), HunyuanWorld 1.0 (3D / Open Source, 126).

Best,
The Manus Team

19cd91ab902ba253.subject: Meeting Summary for Olive oil phenols, bitter bloccker, blue zone gummies
19cd91ab902ba253.body:
Julie Tran has shared notes from Olive oil phenols, bitter bloccker, blue zone gummies, Mar 10. The meeting focused on developing Blue Zone gummies using olive oil phenols and CBN. Evangelos Dadiotis and Prokopios Magiatis discussed the stability and compatibility of olive oil extracts with polysaccharides, noting that aldehydes are incompatible with proteins. Julie Tran highlighted the need to balance bitterness and stability, suggesting pectin candies. They agreed on a 5 mg daily dose of phenols and 50 mg of CBN per gummy. Julie will test the bitterness and stability, with initial samples of 10 g extract. They also discussed potential distribution networks and the need for a mutual NDA. Future plans include exploring other natural products from Blue Zones.

Hi Dustin,

Here's the recording, notes and actions from the meeting: Olive oil phenols, bitter bloccker, blue zone gummies.

– Julie

Olive oil phenols, bitter bloccker, blue zone gummies
Mar 10, 9:55 am, 31 min

Action items:
- Evangelos Dadiotis – Ship olive oil phenols extract (and CBN material as available) to the manufacturer for pilot production and sampling
- Evangelos Dadiotis – Send the recent study on mint compounds that block bitter taste receptors to the team for consideration
- Evangelos Dadiotis – Provide analytical support for trial gummies (receive samples in Boston and analyze stability/phenol content) if samples are sent
- See 7 action items.

19d23d4499553b4a.subject: Manufacturing Inquiry — Micronized Creatine Monohydrate Powder (DTC Women's Wellness)
19d23d4499553b4a.body:
Hi Dustin,

I came across your comment on r/manufacturing about Heron Labs specializing in small batch startups — that's exactly where I am.

I'm Rylan Stern, founder of herReserve, a DTC women's creatine brand launching through Shopify with paid media and content-driven acquisition.

I'm looking for a manufacturing partner for our flagship SKU:

• Product: Unflavored micronized creatine monohydrate powder
• Serving size: 5g per serving
• Container size: 60 servings (~300g net weight)
• Packaging: Stand-up pouch or HDPE jar with scoop
• Initial run: 500–1,000 units
• Timeline: Production-ready within 8–10 weeks

I know Heron Labs focuses on gummies — do you also handle powder products? If not, would you be able to point me toward someone in your network who does small batch powder runs with GMP certification?

Our e-commerce infrastructure, ad creative, and go-to-market strategy are complete. We're finalizing manufacturing now and expect to scale to 2,500–5,000 units within 6 months.

Happy to jump on a call at your convenience.

Best,
Rylan Stern
Founder, herReserve

19da71ff8867b1e6.subject: Re: Inquiry: Manufacturing partner for functional caffeine jelly beans (Zaps)
19da71ff8867b1e6.body:
Quick follow up with answers to your questions and a little more on the strategy behind the product:

Budget: we're considering ~$5k for the initial pilot but open depending on our conversations.
Packaging: Yes, we'd appreciate intros to packaging partners - thanks!
Launch: Ideally within the next 2-3 months.
Distribution: our pilot will leverage social media that will drive traffic to our owned website and tiktok shop account. We will likely handle shipping in-house during this early stage, while we find a 3PL partner. Open to a 3PL partner out of the gate if unit economics makes sense.
Ingredients: will defer to you on this. We'd like to prioritize 'clean' energy that has quick onset and minimal/no crash. if possible, we'd also include hydration/electrolyte properties.

Website: https://zaps-hydrate.vercel.app/

Product Strategy: We're seeing consumers increasingly looking for cleaner sources of energy. Younger demos drinking less coffee, exploring matcha/yerba/functional beverages. Few non-beverage formats deliver clean energy simply. Pre-workout powders/capsules have friction. Jelly beans portable, familiar, easy. Small caffeine per bean = flexible dosing. Niche entry: endurance sports, pre-workout.

Brand: fun and bold for younger demo, TikTok/Instagram. Risk: candy-perception. Can reposition to clean/minimalist for endurance audience without changing product.

Thanks!

Sebastian Flores

19dae2b9244c4c53.subject: Re: Protein Gummies & Heron Labs 4/16/20 Meeting Notes & Next Steps
19dae2b9244c4c53.body:
Following up to show the color adjustment - we have a couple hundred pieces of the gummies on the right, which are the same color you've been receiving up to now. In the center are the first color improvement, we have just what is pictured here. To the left are samples of the final adjusted color that we intended on making more pieces of to ship out. We find there is an improved flavor across all of these samples using an extra strawberry flavor. If you want us to discard or ship some of the samples pictured to the right to particular place due to the paler color, let us know.

[continuing prior thread on Protein Gummies — confirming sugar-free, ingredient list, calorie correction to 120 cal/serving, strawberry color/flavor improvements]

197eb2ae14ea683b.subject: Re: B&B Brands (Samara 888) - New RFQ (Saffron SKU)
197eb2ae14ea683b.body:
These are the items I would alter:

-The "Tapioca IMO(isomaltooligosaccharide) Syrup" is also a certified
organic ingredient, and can be listed "Organic Tapioca
IMO(isomaltooligosaccharide) Syrup"

-The flavor of the product is Raspberry and Peach, we like the "Peach
Berry" flavor name but *the image of fruit on the label art could be a
raspberry* rather than a strawberry.

19d933ee6c6a6d75.subject: TR177461881463076 - B&B Brands Inc.
19d933ee6c6a6d75.body:
Hi,

Your contact information was provided by B&B Brands Inc. in support of the Amazon Dietary Supplement Verification program. We request that you reply to this email with your GMP certification and to confirm the following ASINS are manufactured in this facility within 2 business days. If you are unable to provide this information in the given time frame, we will have to submit a failure for these products.

ASIN: B0DHBXTP7J
TR: TR177461881463076
PRODUCT NAME: Zeolite Gummies

Thank you,
Eurofins Certification Team

I have attached the UPS shipping labels for the final units as requested. Please let us know if you need anything else from our end. On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 4:46 PM Nicky Koch <nicky@heronlabsinc.com> wrote: Hey Andrew and Nickalas, Hello again from Heron, I hope this finds you well. The last of your packaged units are ready to ship! Due to our standard batch sizes, we ended up yielding an additional 91 packaged units, here is the info for the UPS labels: Box dimensions 18"x14"x8" Box 1: 23.7 lbs (50 units) Box 2: 19.5 lbs (41 units) Send over those labels at your convenience and we'll get these shipped out! Thanks very much, Nicky On Thu, Mar 12, 2026 at 2:39 PM Andrew Everett <info@gr33n.com> wrote: Hey Nicky, Thanks for the update! We’d like to go ahead and ship the units that are currently ready. I’ve attached the UPS shipping labels for the shipments. There are two shipments total: • Shipment 1: 6 boxes • Shipment 2: 4 boxes Please let us know once the remaining units are packaged and ready for shipment, and we’ll generate the label for that final box as well. Thanks again! Best, Marj On Thu, Mar 12, 2026 at 3:17 PM Nicky Koch <nicky@heronlabsinc.com> wrote: Hey Nick, No problem. L x W dimensions for the pallet will be the standard 48" x 40", I'll get you a proper height measurement once the team has a chance to palletize the boxes. Total weight of the above-listed boxes, excluding the pallet, should be:  10.5lbs +(9 * 23.7lbs) = 223.8 lbs.  That said: do you want us to ship these units now, or would you prefer that we wait until the final units are packed & ready? The team cooked your final few batches yesterday to complete your 500-unit quantity target. Those final batches will be ready for packaging by early/mid next week, so if you'd like us to wait to ship everything until those final units are ready, we'd just need to hold off on shipping until ~end of next week or so. Alternately, we can plan to ship what's ready now, and then we can ship the final box separately via UPS. Just let us know what you'd like us to do and it shall be so! Thanks very much, Nicky On Wed, Mar 11, 2026 at 5:03 PM Nickalas England <nickalasengland@gmail.com> wrote: Hey Nicky, thank you for this information. We are just trying to find the best shipping option on our end. Do you know the total weight and dimensions if it all is placed on a pallet? I have also attached my assistant to

19c928bedcc1d72a.subject: Re: Certified Labs - Amazon Good Manufacturing Practice Certificate (GMP) (TRF TR176556514561478) (ASIN: B0BXM3W9T1)
19c928bedcc1d72a.body:
This doesn't make sense. I am currently selling a line of kids supplement
gummies on Amazon using the same exact SCS Global certs. So I called seller
support and had them confirm that my certs were valid.

They said "SCS Global is GFSI and therefore compliant".

Have you contacted seller support yet?

*Dustin Powers*
COO | Heron Labs

Contract Manufacturing • R&D • Functional Confectionery

253-651-1604
heronlabs.com

On Wed, Feb 25, 2026, 5:32 PM NUTROTONIC <info@nutrotonic.com> wrote:

> Hey Sam & Dustin,
>
> Amazon just informed me that they rejected all our GMP documents because
> they do not appear to be from a company certified by an Amazon-approved GMP
> certifying company.
>
>
> Please see below Amazon approved third party audits for supplements:
>
>    - Eurofins GMP Process Certified (21 CFR 111/117 Dietary Supplements)
>    - NSF 229 GMP
>    - UL GMP 21 CFR 111
>    - USP GMP for Dietary Supplements
>    - SGS GMP Dietary Supplements
>    - TGA GMP Dietary Supplements
>    - SQF Dietary Supplements Food Safety Code
>    - ISO 22000
>    - CODEX ALIMENTARIUS GENERAL PRINCIPLES OF FOOD HYGIENE (CXC 1-1969)
>    - GFSI-Benchmarked Food Safety Standards that address the requirements
>    of 21 CFR 111 or 21 CFR 117, including:
>       - Global Retailer & Manufacturer Alliance, Inc. (GRMA)
>       Certification Program Version 1.2. NSF/ ANSI 455 - 2 for Dietary Supplement
>       - SQF Food Safety Codes Edition 9 or 10
>       - BRCGS Global Standard for Food Safety Issue
>       - FSSC 22000 Version 6
>       - SSCI
>       - IFS Food v8
>    - GMP Certificates certifying compliance to EudraLex - Volume 4 - Good
>    Manufacturing Practice (GMP) guidelines, issued by the National Competent
>    Authorities (NCA) of the EEA are acceptable.
>    - A Health Canada site license is an acceptable alternative to the
>    listed GMP Certifications.
>
>
> [image: Screenshot 2026-02-25 at 8.29.07 PM.png][image: Screenshot
> 2026-02-25 at 8.29.26 PM.png]
> We need to discuss this ASAP.
> Please let me know which company is scheduled to conduct the auditing and
> what earlier time it has been scheduled to?
> This is an urgent matter. Thanks for your attention.
>
> Respectfully,
> Hamed
>

I wanted to see if you or your team will be attending SupplySide Connect in a few weeks. If so, I'd love to set up some time to connect at our booth.

This year, we're excited to showcase several innovative product concepts at our sample bar:
- Oligen olive extract (acute inflammation, mobility, joint comfort)
- Liquid Feelings: "Good Vibes Energy" (yuzu green tea), "Afternoon Stamina" (ginseng + cordyceps)
- Cellular Detox Gummies

Show Details: SupplySide Connect, April 14th-15th, Meadowlands Exposition Center, Secaucus, NJ. AFS Booth #206.

19d2e252b675df7b.subject: Thank You and Farewell // JUNQI Eric
19d2e252b675df7b.body:
Dear Julie,

I hope you are doing well.

After two years at Junqi, it is time for me to move on to the next chapter of my journey. I will make sure to complete all my handover work by this Friday to ensure a smooth transition. Writing this message is not easy for me, as working with you has truly been one of the most meaningful parts of my time here.

I sincerely appreciate your trust, support, and the great cooperation we have shared. It has not only been a professional experience, but also a memorable one on a personal level.

I have copied my colleague Rae on this email, who will be taking over and continuing to support you. She is very professional, and I am confident you will be in excellent hands.

Although I am saying goodbye for now, I believe we will meet again very soon. I truly look forward to that day.

Eric
Sales Director
JIANGSU JUNQI BIO-TECH CO., LTD
